name: Zariya Finklea
exp_str: church; babysitter; nursing bg; healthcare bg
ai_summary: Zariya Finklea is a college biology student pursuing pediatrician goals with extensive babysitting and nursery experience across church and camp settings. She demonstrates patient, communicative conflict resolution by talking through issues with children and brings strong organization and positivity to create comfortable learning environments.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Zechariah. I'm currently a college student. Majoring in biology, after graduated undergrad school, I will be going to medical school to be a pediatrician. My love for kids has made me want to be a pediatrician. I have little to you been loving kids since I was a kid, I have always been the family's babysitter. I have worked in nurseries.
